OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector, e.g. 'flashpoint'.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: Period of time to await between two runs of the connector (ISO-8601). Currently informational: scheduling still uses 'thehive.interval' (minutes); this becomes the scheduling source in a future version.

THEHIVE_URL.description: Base URL of the TheHive instance.

THEHIVE_API_KEY.description: API key used to authenticate against TheHive.

THEHIVE_ORGANIZATION_NAME.description: Name of the organization used as the author of imported data in OpenCTI.

THEHIVE_CHECK_SSL.description: Whether to verify TheHive's TLS certificate.

THEHIVE_IMPORT_FROM_DATE.description: Earliest creation/update date to import from, as an ISO-8601 datetime (e.g. '2021-01-01T00:00:00'). Defaults to the connector's first start time.

THEHIVE_IMPORT_ONLY_TLP.description: Comma-separated TheHive TLP levels (0-4) to import.

THEHIVE_IMPORT_ALERTS.description: Whether to import TheHive alerts in addition to cases.

THEHIVE_IMPORT_ATTACHMENTS.description: Whether to import case attachments as STIX artifacts.

THEHIVE_SEVERITY_MAPPING.description: Comma-separated mapping of TheHive severity (1-4) to an OpenCTI severity label, as 'level:label' pairs.

THEHIVE_CASE_STATUS_MAPPING.description: Comma-separated mapping of TheHive case extendedStatus to an OpenCTI workflow status id, as 'thehive_status:opencti_status_id' pairs.

THEHIVE_TASK_STATUS_MAPPING.description: Comma-separated mapping of TheHive task status to an OpenCTI workflow status id, as 'thehive_status:opencti_status_id' pairs.

THEHIVE_ALERT_STATUS_MAPPING.description: Comma-separated mapping of TheHive alert status to an OpenCTI workflow status id, as 'thehive_status:opencti_status_id' pairs.

THEHIVE_USER_MAPPING.description: Comma-separated mapping of TheHive assignee email to an OpenCTI user id, as 'email:opencti_user_id' pairs.

THEHIVE_CASE_TAG_WHITELIST.description: Comma-separated list of case tags; if set, only cases bearing one of these tags are imported.

THEHIVE_INTERVAL.description: Number of minutes to wait between two runs of the connector.
